The Helm of the Overlord is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Armor.

Helm of the Overlord
The powerful headpiece of an undead necromancer.
Armor
Cost 5650 (300)
Sell Value 2825
Active Dominate
Bonus ? +21 Strength
+21 Agility
+21 Intelligence
+7 Health Regeneration
+7 Armor
Shareable 0
Disassemble 0
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe

Additional Information

[edit]
  • The item's attributes grant the following additional stats:
    • 462 health and 2.1 health regeneration.
    • 252 mana, 1.05 mana regeneration and 2.1% flat base magic resistance.
    • 21 attack speed and 3.5 main armor.
    • 21 main attack damage to all / / heroes.
    • 28.35 main attack damage to universal heroes.

Ability

[edit]

Dominate

[edit]
Dominate
▶️
Ability
Unit
Affects
Enemy Units
Damage
Instant Kill
Takes control of an enemy non-hero unit, elevating its status to a Creep-Hero, and granting it various stat bonuses. Can dominate ancient creeps.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range:  700
Min Base Health: 1800
Base Attack Damage Bonus: 70
Health Regen Bonus: 12
Mana Regen Bonus: 4
Set Move Speed: 380
Armor Bonus: 7
Set Unit Gold Bounty: 250
The wielder gains a portion of the dominated creep's experience and gold bounties upon taking control over it. The number of max dominated units is bound to the wielder, and shared amongst multiple Helms of the Overlord and Helms of the Dominator.
Max Dominated Units: 1
Dominate Gold Bounty: 100%
Dominate Experience Bounty: 100%
If a target neutral creep has a scaling ability, its level gets increased and has its 4th level unlocked.
Ability Level Bonus: 1
The Immortal's power cannot be obtained by anyone. Roshan cannot be dominated.
If the currently dominated creep takes more than 0 damage from any other player or Roshan (after reductions and not flagged as HP Removal), the item goes on a fixed cooldown. Cannot be reset with cooldown reset sources.
Downtime: 3
45
50
  • Details
  • Status Effects
  • Misc.
  • Show All
  • Cannot dominate the following units:
    • Creep-heroes
    • Siege Creeps
    • Both the Necronomicon Archer and the Necronomicon Warrior.
  • Dominating a creep while already having one dominated instantly kills the previously dominated creep.
  • Grants the caster the dominated creep's default 100% and 100% bounty upon cast.
  • Applies a basic dispel on the creep upon cast.
  • Manipulates the creep's stats in the following ways:
    • Sets the unit's type to Creep-Hero.
    • Sets base movement speed to 380, regardless of its default movement speed.
    • If max health is below the min health threshold, sets current and max health to 1800.
    • Sets gold bounty to 250 , overwriting its default bounty.
    • Increases base attack damage, it is not granted as an attack damage bonus.
    • Increases health regen and mana regen.
    • Grants an armor bonus, it is not added to the base armor.
    • If cast on a neutral creep, increases its abilities' by 1 and unlocks their 4th level.
      • For a full list of neutral creep abilities, refer to the chart below.
    • Does not restore the creep's mana.
modifier_dominated
Hidden modifier
modifier_item_helm_of_the_dominator_bonushealth
Hidden modifier
  • The number of max allowed units is bound to the player. Buying a new Helm of the Overlord does not allow dominating an additional unit.
    • This also goes for the Tempest Double's copied Helm of the Overlord.
    • When the item gets sold or destroyed, the dominated creep dies.
      • When the item gets sold by a teammate while being disconnected the dominated creep does not die.
    • The death is not credited to anyone so that no one gets experience from it.
  • Reinforced units receive less damage (before reductions) from the dominated creep.
  • Does not share cooldowns with Helm of the Dominator.

Upgradeable Creep Abilities

[edit]

The following neutral creeps have upgradable abilities that have their 4th level unlocked by Helm of the Dominator.

Dominated Creeps Upgradable Abilities
  • Alpha Wolf – Critical Strike
  • Ancient Black Dragon – Fireball
  • Ancient Black Drake – Magic Amplification Aura
  • Ancient Croaker – Riverborn Aura
  • Ancient Frostbitten Golem – Time Warp Aura
  • Ancient Granite Golem – Granite Aura
  • Ancient Ice Shaman – Icefire Bomb
  • Ancient Marshmage – Riverborn Aura
  • Ancient Prowler Acolyte – Prowler Aura
  • Ancient Prowler Shaman – Desecrate
  • Ancient Rock Golem – Weakening Aura
  • Ancient Rumblehide – War Drums Aura

  • Boglet – Riverborn Aura

  • Fell Spirit – Vex
  • Ghost – Frost Attack
  • Giant Wolf – Intimidate
  • Harpy Scout – Take Off
  • Harpy Stormcrafter – Chain Lightning
  • Hellbear – Swiftness Aura

  • Hill Troll – Ensnare
  • Hill Troll Berserker – Break

  • Pollywog – Riverborn Aura

  • Satyr Mindstealer – Mana Burn

  • Warpine Raider – Seed Shot

  • Wildwing Ripper – Hurricane

Recent Changes

Version
Description
7.39e
(2025-10-02)
  • Dominate
    • Now goes on a 3-second un-resettable cooldown whenever the currently dominated creep takes damage from a player or Roshan .
    • Increased mana cost from 0 to 50.
7.39
(2025-05-21)
  • Reduced Helm of the Dominator cost from 2625 to 2550 (total cost decreases ▼ from 5725 to 5650 ).
  • CHANGED shop category from Accessories to Armor.
7.38c
(2025-03-27)
  • The Dominated creep is now considered a Creep-Hero . [?]
